_comment: Game list for the MakeCode Arcade Kiosk. Three MakeCode share-id formats supported: (1) 20-digit numeric e.g. '50225-04801-24334-14778', (2) S-prefix e.g. 'S33849-24922-26975-56296', (3) persistent share id e.g. '_aBcDeF'. Get share IDs by opening a game on arcade.makecode.com and clicking Share. (GitHub repo paths are NOT supported at runtime — to use a GitHub-hosted game, import it into MakeCode Arcade and share to get a share ID.)

games.name: Starfox
games.description: Shoot enemy fighters in space! Made by Elliot.
